textByHash.489da01f3c5a49f68fc1da1777d0736bea6cd5a4: I'll have ye guts fer garters!
textByHash.151b5ca08d4bbf4aaac096acc7d223b804cf1304: Arr! Run him through sez I!
textByHash.acdb978244e56ccf2af1c8dcfcdb1752819d1eb7: Where's the treasure? Who told ye about me treasure?
textByHash.833003395e7307f9db79b06546d1958db1376391: Takin' a walk, gettin' some air.
textByHash.340cc8997b1dac8d5dbe98436250965f206ca780: Arr? Be ye wantin' te go on account with our gang o' fillibusters?
textByHash.e2d61a45774331b987e1966d6c9f24c8fb21c116: The powder monkey be takin' a caulk after gettin' rowdy on bumboo, so there be plenty of room for ye.
textByHash.c549fdb0b79a4b1e0463ffbdfc3274a1e9d362a6: What's a landlubber like ye doin' here?
textByHash.2a6b88530405eab7f8835c97d3bd947ef84af297: Well done to ye. I'll see ye around.
textByHash.1d91884a9b724f2fcccd374e623d105fb4a11ce5: Well lad, it's 'cos there be foul things in the jungle beyond.
textByHash.f14be95ea311924dadb65733b32fc6073a06be2b: Well lass, it's 'cos there be foul things in the jungle beyond.
textByHash.b9b5ba7dfee65714dcd68f2d1a3d89b41e7eb180: Big 'uns, nasty 'uns. You name it, we got it.
textByHash.e690d8fe9b0fc8227623cb039fdec3897a415ab0: There be Jungle Horrors in the jungles, and Cave Horrors in the caves.
textByHash.09af11cf46de54a4fde9f4814e825c9001abb263: Tis no place te be havin' a picnic and no mistake.
textByHash.57601b3b9f1cb8253ea975ac7720ac2d49d62702: Then it must have been my fault and I apologise lad.
textByHash.03357970c921a66e798f47c419926a16bc1f1473: Then it must have been my fault and I apologise lass.
textByHash.2bd02d201344ddda0782592bb0cf83b46aa8e99a: Aye, good day te ye too.
textByHash.ae0ba13e382ff4bef03297a92d39cd3ed4ec919c: I suppose it is. What of it?
textByHash.02f7ebd6647aa0a949041139ea33e5c9702f3617: Well...why would ye do a thing like that?
textByHash.1d22abdd3786ef190aaf683bc1a9533d3cce44d8: What ship did ye pull in on, stranger?
textByHash.dbff13908aca991f1457b123ac738d39efcb1da1: That's a good ship, that it be.
textByHash.30260a367cf9f6061433e2288aa8deff4fdc47d7: Keep yer voice down lass, can't ye see I'm busy?
textByHash.3a8bf1a86bbbcf5cce5a3cc01c23bf3320949d64: Keep yer voice down lad, can't ye see I'm busy?
textByHash.fd039b891d7d7c14c5e52decec604da78c6f4126: I can't feel me brains no more...
textByHash.12894ba2ffcb1160da2db7f58a09b6dfe81c77a9: Are ye here for...you know...the stuff...
textByHash.1b3b46d3c13a39bb6f6436cabd13438181c4a0d6: Ain't ye the scurvy curr that killed my brother?
textByHash.034a89e3c6de6d6e3110515255fa3633515c621d: How many things de ye have te kill in a day te lose count?
textByHash.98d429d7945336dbfcd73edf7e78e0ffcd48d9a0: Never mind! I never liked him that much anyway!
textByHash.0b815c51e5d15ec69a414569697b47f1c7a0167b: Arr, we like te keep the peace around here.
textByHash.64e0c693b394671006830524746dc32748ee732b: Some of the older pirates don't like it, but Mos Le'Harmless be a hive of sense and civility.
textByHash.c9ee506b50412c01edf35ba4741744ce74f5c637: Well, I'm one of the militia, we try and keep the rest of the pirates in line.
textByHash.a63a43702b15e5a7ae21198c04dc9a401813229d: Well, as in line as we reckon they need to be.
textByHash.5f7445105e056e4f31f193906a49047f2eb390e2: Well, if yer ship is in need of repairs and yer in port, then yer a member, simple as that.
textByHash.410e88dc46f0c7649ee11c1892bf063ba8483e1d: See, those of us that are here for a long haul tend to want to keep things peaceful, so we keep an eye on everyone else as and when they come in.
textByHash.2e34dee0af1988c05ed1d35ca7ec81074dc3430f: Given the number of skirmishes we have with customs, there is never a shortage of repairs needed.
textByHash.e9fc525658cc4f2c9d36d3a1a432da65b8389e12: See to it ye keeps outs trouble, stranger.
textByHash.032e2f46b119d6c2172b42a461cdce98152c9cda: Well good luck with that, landlubber.
textByHash.afddd3f1e5a558c84a5732c5da141d6da80581dc: Adventurin' eh...that sounds like customs and excise work to my ears.
textByHash.67a7dfcbb09459c6ba5d208a33a826ba1ab3810a: I'll have me eye on ye, customs boy. One step out of line and bam.
textByHash.f4dfd1c990123255d2f5da5cff7858eb266e941c: I'll have me eye on ye, customs girl. One step out of line and bam.
textByHash.09beb7f1c7b528c64a5ad263ce7cc5eb8a83a326: They won't find enough of ye to feed a hungry sea slug.
textByHash.14abbc9dade7ade7aab658d029c7400fe687cdf7: Well, if yeve got some coins in yer purse ye can head over to Joe's house of 'Rum' and get yerself drunk.
textByHash.1431b6986cb2dbd08fe95f8fbbfce9a878fdc2f6: Well, Smithin' Smith and Dodgy Mike have some stuff to sell, and ye can always try grabbin' some fish from Two Feet Charley if yer hungry.
textByHash.84c7498a711e4a4793e5bfe7b29d944515cc8a29: Well, ye can head out to the brewery and have a word with Fancy Dan or San Fan. They always need a hand out there.
textByHash.94a40a5e49dad873a53cd9fcfcc4b6a1b8e86725: Doin' each others heads in most of the time.
textByHash.73af110f0d7e267a4de43a24a3d6b8e8f16fb9dc: Well have a good day, sir.
textByHash.b9968fe078a6a7f312d1678bd51a0c34868c117a: Well have a good day, miss.
textByHash.b298f96899448428c0f28336695278e469020184: I used to be a language tutor, teaching in a small school just outside of Lumbridge.
textByHash.fa89a1fbc03d0bef1a8575221ae0dbafa077e067: However the place closed down due to ill attendance, and so I was forced to take up piracy.
textByHash.e3fd2094610b5a4d04dad37fb69cbc21814693c1: Not really, I made my way through via a short stint as a lawyer.
textByHash.21d9a05d5cebde5caa53950969120ce4e010f3ab: I must return to my duties. Have a nice day!
textByHash.99c75945deb9ad4def3de09acedb079b548e4570: I'm not drunk! I'll knock down any man as sayin' I'm been having a drinking on my duties!
textByHash.07033a1013873f92b6e19b28f38145ae988d1896: Arrr, ye got me. I just can't leave the stuff alone.
textByHash.e892f5c75699709c242716c721da2e07c43d623e: Cap'n Braindeath's Ten X With Added Cattle Medication just keeps singin' its siren song to me.
textByHash.c70670dc76d66337c81a73b9790438612973f6a8: Would ye care fer a drop?
textByHash.7cef7cd39378ae34cf442b381f3d71ed51ebe7de: Bill hired you eh? He must have been scrapin' the barrel and no mistake.
textByHash.4e578178d676ac7d3e6afa8598bef39bea95ed5e: Yo ho ho and bottle of alcopop!
textByHash.906669de3fdd171011700c2d1742bc75f59e2406: Good day to you my dear sir!
textByHash.3cace6c2bc3dd0cc7fd96549cc2649ec7b79e664: 3 days at port for resupply then out on the high sea!
textByHash.6035151a26644bd40685f42d4a797b12c54b4573: Arrh! I be in search of buried treasure!
textByHash.52d0692e8a1d34796cecc765513ea503a99d32f1: You'll be joining Davey Jones in his locker!
textByHash.57e8e5211f71b6e75170fb30bb1d27af84647a0b: Batton down the hatches there's a storm a brewin!
textByHash.17fc9ebe5561025bfba73bcc07eb4805c9819c69: I think ye'll be taking a long walk off a short plank!
textByHash.bc3d7d7b67c08e8196d35836aaeb54b0a4297e28: I'm the scourge of the seven seas!
textByHash.93d8c0abf466698f7585ac1e504bb9f382669dd8: Yo ho ho and a bottle of rum!
textByHash.57c0945c577ed21cb4eaec5a91d46bb5e3158af1: Pieces of eight! pieces of eight!
textByHash.e4b05ef0c5d75d7cad8916594b41ea54b232d05e: Oh wait that's the parrot's line.
textByHash.1351ad24249c5d0dd785bdc57c8a61ca33e7fb6d: I'm the scourge of the six seas!
